name: ponsai-fullstack
description: Full-stack bonsai e-commerce application - Ponsai (Angular + Node.js/Express/MongoDB)

scripts.postinstall: npm --prefix backend install && npm --prefix backend run build
scripts.build: npm run build:frontend && npm run build:backend
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install && cd ..
scripts.test: npm run test:backend && npm run test:frontend

author: Ki8 Development Team
